name: Melons Stuffed with Fruits and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 small Melons (cantaloupe is a good choice)
1 cup Green Onion, chopped (green part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each melon in half and remove and discard the seeds.
2. Scoop out the fruit and reserve it.
3. Heat 1/3 cup oil in a large skillet.
4. Add the carrots and raisins to the skillet. Saute together until the carrots are soft.
5. Add salt, pepper, apple, green onion, and lemon rind. Continue cooking until the apples are soft.
6. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
7. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Combine the sauteed mixture with cooked rice and stuff the melons.
9. Chop up two cups of the reserved melon and arrange on top of the stuffing.
10. Place the stuffed melons in a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
11. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a small pan and brown the pine nuts, being careful not to let them burn.
12. Sprinkle the pine nuts over the baked melons and serve.
